---
title: "Slaves of Sabinus, Jew & Gentile, The"
---

## Slaves of Sabinus, Jew & Gentile, The

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** October 1890
**Genre:** Fiction (historical)
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** National Society’s Depository, Broad Sanctuary, London.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
